Invention.title: Invention
Invention.description: An invention idea uploaded by an elementary school student.

shortIdea.description: Short summary or line describing the invention.

description.description: Detailed polished explanation of the invention.

targetAudience.description: Recommended audience or group for this invention.

imageUrl.description: Image URL or Base64 representation of drawing/clay model.

authorId.description: User UID who posted the invention.

authorPhoto.description: Profile picture URL of the author.

likesCount.description: Total number of stars or cheers.

likedBy.description: Array of user UIDs who cheered for this invention.

createdAt.description: Server timestamp when the invention was registered.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A collaborative encouraging feedback or suggestion from standard users on an Invention.

authorId.description: User UID who posted the comment.

authorPhoto.description: Profile picture URL of the commenter.

createdAt.description: Server timestamp when the comment was written.

/inventions/{inventionId}.description: Creative inventions uploaded by elementary school students.

/comments/{commentId}.description: Encouraging peers feedback comments for creative ideas.
